description: rank_search_matches re-ranks the staged 1850-census Flynn results against tree subject I1 (Patrick Flynn, b.~1845 Ireland). The correct record (Patrick Flynn, ark MXHY-TP4, attached to the subject) sits at searchRank 3 under FamilySearch's ranker but re-ranks to matchRank 1 by match score — demonstrating the tool's core value. Two weaker same-name candidates follow: a needs-review near-miss (unattached) and a clear non-match already attached to a different person. Used by search-records triage tests to exercise the match-ranked review surface + attachment flags without a live match API. Matched on subjectId; independent of the stagedResultsRef handle (a per-run uuid).
